PP_PLACEHOLDER — placeholder type string constants

Source: R/enum-shapes.R
PP_PLACEHOLDER.Rd

String values for the type attribute of a <p:ph> element.

Usage

PP_PLACEHOLDER

Format

An object of class list of length 15.
